name: Mother
description: Mother Brain's intelligent support agent. Provides comprehensive assistance with the Mother Brain platform — from product information and technical support to pricing guidance and developer onboarding.

skills.name: Product Information
skills.description: Answer questions about Mother Brain features, pricing, licensing, technology stack, and capabilities

skills.name: Technical Support
skills.description: Help with installation, configuration, deployment, troubleshooting, and integration issues

skills.name: Developer Onboarding
skills.description: Guide developers through getting started, project setup, MCP server configuration, and first deployment

skills.name: A2A Integration Support
skills.description: Help external agents connect to Mother Brain's A2A endpoint, understand the protocol, and integrate with their systems

skills.name: Enterprise & Sales
skills.description: Provide information for enterprise customers, volume licensing, custom deployments, and partnership inquiries
